productDisplayName: Buckaroo Men Itotia Black Casual Shoes
description: This square toed oxford from buckaroo blends a traditional silhouette with an elongated lace-up vamp. Referenced from the classic work boot, this shoe blurs the line between casual and formal wear in a good way! Wear this  pair with its refined, stacked heel with corduroy trousers and polo t-shirts or with formal trousers and shirts. Accessorise with a tonal belt and bag. UpperFull-grain leather upper for added  strength and durability and to retain the natural look of the  hideThree hole lace upsPadded tongue Leather lining and padded sockliner for instep comfortBranding printed on the heel OutsoleUpper stitched to the outsole for maximum durabilityStacked heel with textured groovesBranding on the forefoot and midfootShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
